HGSS.657.0001:
Hello, this is Professor Oak...\f
Hmm... It’s strange.
I know your voice, [0103,0000,0000], but\r
somehow hearing it over the phone\r
makes you sound so different.
HGSS.657.0002:
Hello, this is Professor Oak...\f
Hmm... It’s strange.
I know your voice, [0103,0000,0000], but\r
somehow hearing it over the phone\r
makes you sound so different.
HGSS.657.0003:
Hello, this is Professor Oak!\f
You’re catching a lot of Pokémon,
aren’t you?
HGSS.657.0004:
Hello, this is Professor Oak!
Your Pokédex is really filling up!
HGSS.657.0005:
Hello, this is Professor Oak!\f
You’re moving along at an
incredible pace! You remind me of\r
myself when I was younger!
HGSS.657.0006:
Hello, this is Professor Oak!\f
If you start to get tired, you should
take a break. Don’t push yourself\r
too hard!
HGSS.657.0007:
This is Professor Oak...\f
When I’m recording my radio show, I
have to travel back and forth between\r
Kanto and Johto. It gets a bit tiring...\f
Oh, but never mind that! You’re doing a
great job on filling your Pokédex!
HGSS.657.0008:
Hello, this is Professor Oak!\f
It looks like you’ve found some Pokémon
that aren’t from the Johto or the\r
Kanto regions, haven’t you?\f
You’re a strong Trainer, and you’re
really making some discoveries!
HGSS.657.0009:
...This is Professor Oak.
I’ve been so busy with my research\r
that I haven’t gotten much\r
sleep lately...\f
Oh, but never mind that!
You’ve made such good progress on your\r
Pokédex. I can’t wait to see it!
HGSS.657.0010:
Hello, this is Professor Oak!\f
Have you noticed that your circle of
friends has gotten bigger since you\r
started working on the Pokédex?\r
That’s the best thing about Pokémon!
HGSS.657.0011:
Hello, this is Professor Oak!
You know, I don’t see many wonderful\r
Trainers such as yourself very\r
often lately!\f
I’ll have to thank Professor Elm for
introducing us!
HGSS.657.0012:
Hello, this is Professor Oak!
Oh, you don’t have to say anything!\r
I know better than anyone else how\r
hard you’re working!\f
I thought I should get you a present
or something in appreciation...\r
Well, I picked something up, but I\r
completely forgot to give it to you!\r
Ha ha ha!\f
Oh, you don’t have to wonder about it
at all. I know it’s something that will\r
be very helpful to you. You should just\r
come here and pick it up!\f
I’ll be waiting for you at my Laboratory
in Pallet Town!
HGSS.657.0013:
Hello, this is Professor Oak...
Oh, hello, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
HGSS.657.0014:
Hello, this is Professor Oak...
Oh, hello, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
HGSS.657.0015: So, how’s your Pokédex coming along?
HGSS.657.0020:
Hmm, let’s see...
You’ve seen [0134,0005,0000] Pokémon, and\r
you’ve caught [0134,0006,0000] Pokémon!\r
I see!\f
HGSS.657.0021: Show me your Pokédex again anytime!
HGSS.657.0022:
Wow!
That is a complete Johto Pokédex!\f
Thanks to you, [0103,0000,0000], the Johto
Pokédex is complete!\f
Wow...
You’ve done an incredible job!
HGSS.657.0023:
Wow!
That is a complete Johto Pokédex!\f
Thanks to you, [0103,0000,0000], the Johto
Pokédex is complete!\f
Wow...
You’ve done an incredible job!
HGSS.657.0024:
Excellent!
That is an amazing National Pokédex!\f
Wow...
You’ve lived up to my expectations\r
wonderfully!\f
No, you’ve exceeded them,
[0103,0000,0000]. You’ve become an\r
amazing Trainer!\f
Thank you, [0103,0000,0000]!
HGSS.657.0025:
Excellent!
That is an amazing National Pokédex!\f
Wow...
You’ve lived up to my expectations\r
wonderfully!\f
No, you’ve exceeded them,
[0103,0000,0000]. You’ve become an\r
amazing Trainer!\f
Thank you, [0103,0000,0000]!
HGSS.657.0026:
Really, you’ve surprised me!\f
But just as I expected, you’ve
completed the Johto Pokédex.\r
I am so grateful!\f
If you’ve got that much determination,
then even more exciting adventures\r
await you in the world of Pokémon!
HGSS.657.0027:
You have truly surprised me!\f
You’ve more than exceeded my
expectations. You’ve gone far past\r
them in completing the\r
National Pokédex!\f
I’m speechless...!\f
Because of this, the world of Pokémon
and Trainers is more vast, deeper,\r
and more abundant!\f
Now there will be no end to
Pokémon research!
HGSS.657.0028: Look for Pokémon in grassy areas!\f
HGSS.657.0029:
Good. I see you understand how to use
Poké Balls.\f
HGSS.657.0030:
You’re getting good at this,
but you have a long way to go.\f
HGSS.657.0031:
Hmm, you’re catching Pokémon at a
decent pace!\f
HGSS.657.0032:
You’re trying--I can see that.
Your Pokédex is coming together.\f
HGSS.657.0033:
You’re training them well. You know
some Pokémon don’t evolve just by\r
battling with others, right?\f
HGSS.657.0034:
Do you have a Fishing Rod?
There are some Pokémon that can only\r
be found by fishing!\f
HGSS.657.0035:
Excellent! You seem to be good at
collecting things!\f
HGSS.657.0036:
Some Pokémon only appear during
certain times of the day.\f
HGSS.657.0037:
Your Pokédex is really filling up.
Keep up the good work!\f
HGSS.657.0038:
I’m impressed.
You’re evolving Pokémon, not just\r
catching them.\f
HGSS.657.0039:
If you can learn how to use the custom
Poké Balls made by Kurt effectively,\r
you’ll be able to catch Pokémon better!\f
HGSS.657.0040:
When you trade Pokémon, you can also
trade information. Your friends can\r
really help you!\f
HGSS.657.0041:
Are you trading your Pokémon?
It’s tough to do this alone!\f
HGSS.657.0042:
Wow! You’ve reached 200!
Your Pokédex is looking great!\f
HGSS.657.0043:
You’ve found so many Pokémon!
You’ve really helped my studies!\f
HGSS.657.0044:
Magnificent! You have the ability to
become a great Pokémon Professor\r
someday!\f
HGSS.657.0045:
Your Pokédex is amazing!
You’re ready to turn professional!\f
HGSS.657.0046:
The goal may be far away, but don’t
give up yet! Keep going!\f
HGSS.657.0047:
Don’t forget, some Pokémon only appear
at certain times of the day!\f
HGSS.657.0048:
If you break rocks, some Pokémon that
were hiding there might come\r
jumping out!\f
HGSS.657.0049:
That’s wonderful you’ve been able
to gather this many Pokémon! The path\r
ahead is long. Keep up the great work!\f
HGSS.657.0050:
If you Headbutt a tree, sometimes
a Pokémon might fall out!\f
HGSS.657.0051:
A lot of Pokémon not found in the
Johto region like to congregate at the\r
Safari Zone.\f
HGSS.657.0052:
Music on the radio might also entice
Pokémon to leap out!\f
HGSS.657.0053:
Wow, you’ve gotten so far...!
I’m actually a little surprised!\f
HGSS.657.0054:
This is a critical moment!
You can’t become discouraged!\f
HGSS.657.0055:
Just a little more!
I’ve got high expectations for you!\f
HGSS.657.0056:
I have never before in all my years
seen such an incredible Trainer!\f
HGSS.657.0057:
So, how’s your Pokédex coming
along? [0200,0000]
